attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
AE_HEADER_ID                  
,AE_LINE_NUM                   
,APPLICATION_ID                
,CODE_COMBINATION_ID           
,GL_SL_LINK_ID                 
,ACCOUNTING_CLASS_CODE         
,PARTY_ID                      
,PARTY_SITE_ID                 
,PARTY_TYPE_CODE               
,ENTERED_DR                    
,ENTERED_CR                    
,ACCOUNTED_DR                  
,ACCOUNTED_CR                  
,CURRENCY_CODE                 
,ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY            
,ATTRIBUTE1                    
,ATTRIBUTE2                    
,ATTRIBUTE3
,ATTRIBUTE4
,ATTRIBUTE5
,ATTRIBUTE6
,ATTRIBUTE7
,ATTRIBUTE8                    
,GL_SL_LINK_TABLE              
,UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_DR        
,UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_CR        
,UNROUNDED_ENTERED_DR          
,UNROUNDED_ENTERED_CR          
,ACCOUNTING_DATE               
,LEDGER_ID                     
,SOURCE_TABLE                  
,SOURCE_ID                     
,CREATION_DATE                 
,LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,GLOBAL_NAME                   
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG_XLA_AE_LINES_AR ST
WHERE (ST.APPLICATION_ID = 222 OR 
	ST.APPLICATION_ID IN (SELECT APPLICATION_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR 
	WHERE UPPER(APPLICATION_NAME) IN ('REVENUE ACCOUNTING ENGINE','CISCO TWO TIER','CISCO OPEN RMA','CISCO NAT ADJUSTMENTS')  AND LANG = 'US'))
AND NOT EXISTS (
SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_LINES_AR EL
WHERE EL.AE_HEADER_ID                  	=	ST.	AE_HEADER_ID                   
AND EL.AE_LINE_NUM                   	=	ST.	AE_LINE_NUM                    
AND EL.APPLICATION_ID                	=	ST.	APPLICATION_ID    
AND EL.GLOBAL_NAME                   	=	ST.	GLOBAL_NAME 
)
